value.description: is giving a presidential address from the dais. If all goes well, every ranked participant will gain a small amount of Votes, and they will gain Votes for each ranked participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will cause social strain and lose Votes for each ranked participant. The outcome depends on their social abilities. Whitespring officials currently in the area will join the address and count as ranked participants.
Commissions the Member title on a selected pawn. That pawn receives 1 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Member or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the Private title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 7 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Private or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the Sergeant title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 13 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Sergeant or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the Lieutenant title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 21 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Lieutenant or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the Captain title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 31 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Captain or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the Colonel title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a Colonel or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.
Commissions the General title on a selected pawn. That pawn now has 45 Votes. Can’t be cast on a pawn that’s already a General or higher. Has a 3 day cooldown.

A non-alcoholic, pleasantly light, citrusy, and slightly bitter aperitif that owes its flavors and aromas to sweet and bitter oranges, rhubarb, and Whitespring craftsmanship. Its recipe is guarded by Whitespring hospitality offices, and few on the rim have managed to recreate it. Drinking it induces heavy but painless vomiting, completely clearing the stomach and resetting the palate.\n\nWhitespring officials prize aperitif for letting them indulge in even more of the settlement's finest cuisine.
An organized Brotherhood expeditionary force dedicated to disrupting the Whitespring Enclave.
Brotherhood of Steel Expeditionary Force
+1 Votes every 5 days when {PAWN_pronoun} is in {SETTLEMENT_label}.
50% chance of +1 Votes for every kill with {WEAPON_label}.
+3 Votes after a successful art exhibition.
This screen allows you to view all members of the Whitespring Enclave faction. You can spend Votes to invite them as visitors.
This screen allows you to customize and select permits for each of your commissioned officials.
This screen allows you to contract nearby Whitespring bases to receive regular contributions from them.
This screen allows you to assign previously unlocked ranks to your colonists, providing them with unique but highly specific perks.
This settlement provides Votes to its supervising administration.
Build presidential decor like Whitespring rugs, mirrors, grand chairs, Whitespring slabs, candelabras, and more.
Construct a presidential desk chair suited for senior Whitespring officials and their ceremonial duties.
Craft heavy trooper armor, light powered armor that’s commonly used by Whitespring recon troops. Note that these also require advanced components.
Issues a commendation to a worthy pawn.
Commissions a government rank for a worthy pawn.
Upon completion of the parade, the vice president and their chosen companions will formally enter executive service to the Whitespring Enclave.

Initiate a presidential address from the dais. {ORGANIZER_labelShort} is giving a presidential address from the dais. If all goes well, every ranked participant will gain a small amount of Votes, and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will gain Votes for each ranked participant. If it goes poorly, the speech will cause social strain and {ORGANIZER_labelShort} will lose Votes for each ranked participant. The outcome depends on {ORGANIZER_labelShort}'s social abilities. Whitespring officials currently in the area will join the address and count as ranked participants.
Call a scientist to assist you for 4 days. This specialist can only perform research-related tasks. You can control him as though he were one of your own colonists. You are required to keep him safe.
Call a group of 6 presidential guards, ranged and melee, to aid you in battle.
Call an orbital beam from a Whitespring flagship in orbit. The beam will travel in a direction specified by you, burning everything it touches.

Call a light trooper to assist you for 4 days. This specialist is a master assassin and will not perform any tasks other than killing. You can control them as though they were one of your own colonists. If a light trooper dies, a replacement will arrive immediately and inherit the remaining contract time.
The Whitespring rank of general is reserved for senior commanders who have built the infrastructure needed to host inspections, briefings, and high-level visitors.

The Whitespring title of attorney general is one of the highest ranks in the middle government. In the Whitespring Enclave, attorney generals oversee frontier territories and protect the edge of Whitespring space. During wartime, they can field fleets that either hold the line or support broader offensive operations.

The Whitespring title of senator is commissioned to secretaries whose jurisdiction requires a larger command structure to maintain order. Senators are expected to field and train their own divisions and, in peacetime, expand the Enclave's regional administrative reach.

The Whitespring title of state secretary is the middle rank of high government. In the Whitespring Enclave, a state secretary is expected to coordinate the settlement's vast military capabilities in both peace and wartime, operating directly under the president.

The Whitespring title of minister maintains authority over a strategically important system. In the Whitespring Enclave, ministers ensure that resources continue to flow into Whitespring stockpiles and factories while their offices hold key administrative positions throughout the system of government.

The Whitespring title of president represents supreme executive authority within the Whitespring Enclave. The office answers to no higher power and is expected not only to maintain control, but to expand the Enclave's influence wherever possible. Very few are capable of receiving this title, and even fewer wish to take on its responsibilities.

It was supposed to be another quiet night for your Whitespring splinter cell, tucked away in a secluded estate far from the main administrative halls. You do not know whether the blackout was caused by Brotherhood sabotage, a compromised security officer, or a simple systems failure, but when the perimeter defenses died at midnight your enclave cell was left blind and exposed. By the time the gates opened, there was no time to organize a proper response - only to hide and survive. You heard your officers, researchers, and support staff being cut down as the Brotherhood expeditionary strike team swept through the compound. Whatever remained of your old command structure died with them. Now your splinter cell is shattered, your safehouse is burning, and revenge will mean nothing unless you escape this raid alive. You can wait the assault out, use permits to call for reinforcements, or try running for the hills - the choice is yours. Note: Since you start during a raid in progress, this is a difficult scenario.

value.text: It was supposed to be another quiet night for your Whitespring splinter cell, tucked away in a secluded estate far from the main administrative halls. You do not know whether the blackout was caused by Brotherhood sabotage, a compromised security officer, or a simple systems failure, but when the perimeter defenses died at midnight your enclave cell was left blind and exposed. By the time the gates opened, there was no time to organize a proper response - only to hide and survive. You heard your officers, researchers, and support staff being cut down as the Brotherhood expeditionary strike team swept through the compound. Whatever remained of your old command structure died with them. Now your splinter cell is shattered, your safehouse is burning, and revenge will mean nothing unless you escape this raid alive. You can either wait the raid out, use permits to call for reinforcements, or try running for the hills - the choice is yours.

value.description: A spacer-tech Whitespring gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. Equipped with a twin-linked autocannon for ground support, these XVB02s often land in the middle of the battlefield to extract stranded troops.
An ornate chair used by the President for official addresses and meditation. Sitting in the presidential desk chair can serve as a focus for ceremonial duties and cryptid meditation.

An exceedingly complex facemask fitted with advanced technology reserved for senior Whitespring scientists. It is designed for designated researchers so they can advance the Whitespring Enclave's needs without rest.\n\nThe inlaid techprint synchronizes with the wearer's brain while they perform research, effectively doubling research speed while restoring rest and recreation.

A high-tech helmet with a solid plasteel-weave shell and multi-spectrum sensors that feed telemetry data to the wearer. While it provides excellent protection, its primary purpose is concealment through an intricate optical camouflage system backed by real-time firing solutions. Armor like this is reserved for the Whitespring Enclave's elite assassins due to limited production.

A high-tech suit of powered armor with layered plasteel-weave plates and multi-spectrum sensors that feed telemetry data to the wearer. While it provides excellent protection, its primary purpose is concealment through an intricate optical camouflage system that also assists the user's movement. Armor like this is reserved for the Whitespring Enclave's elite assassins due to limited production.
A stoney bas relief of Whitespring imagery for decorating a floor.
An intricate rug with a Whitespring-style pattern, for decorating a floor.
A majestic rug with a Whitespring-style pattern, for decorating a floor.
I am the recipient of the Great Commendation.
I'm embarrassed that we hosted such a terrible art exhibit. Our art will never be respected in the Whitespring Enclave now!
